name: tokenmaxxer
description: Provider-agnostic desktop usage tracker for LLM subscriptions (Codex, Gemini/Antigravity, ...).

scripts.render:product-shot: tailwindcss -i ./src/index.css -o ./remotion/remotion.css && remotion still remotion/index.tsx TokenMaxxerProductShot public/tokenmaxxer-product-shot.png --overwrite && remotion still remotion/index.tsx TokenMaxxerAddAccountShot public/tokenmaxxer-add-account-shot.png --overwrite && remotion still remotion/index.tsx TokenMaxxerAccountDetailsShot public/tokenmaxxer-account-details-shot.png --overwrite && remotion still remotion/index.tsx TokenMaxxerOpenRouterSetupShot public/tokenmaxxer-openrouter-setup-shot.png --overwrite
scripts.render:hero-demo: tailwindcss -i ./src/index.css -o ./remotion/remotion.css && remotion render remotion/index.tsx TokenMaxxerHeroDemo public/tokenmaxxer-demo.mp4 --overwrite
